title: pteris glauca
intro: Pteris glauca, also known as the ferny-leaved bracken, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Pteris genus, a group of ferns commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, Pteris glauca has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pteris glauca include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pteris glauca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often consumed for their therapeutic effects or used topically for wound healing and skin conditions.
